scripts.dev: pnpm run dev:server & pnpm run dev:web
scripts.dev:desktop: pnpm run dev:server & pnpm run dev:web & pnpm --filter @cc-pet/desktop dev
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm --filter @cc-pet/server test -- tests/e2e-connect-regression.test.ts && pnpm --filter @cc-pet/web test -- src/App.integration.test.tsx
